name: SignatureGate - Upload Evidence via n8n (Base64 -> NocoDB)

parameters.query:
UPDATE member_agreements
SET
  status = 'signed',
  signed_at = NOW(),
  evidence =
    COALESCE(NULLIF(evidence, '')::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)
    || COALESCE($2::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)
WHERE member_agreement_id = $1::uuid
RETURNING member_agreement_id;
